name: Capital One Venture X Business

earning_rates.description: 10X miles on hotels and rental cars booked through Capital One Travel
10X miles on flights booked through Capital One Travel

features: 10,000 anniversary bonus miles each year starting with first anniversary

Global Entry / TSA PreCheck credit (up to $120)
Up to $100 credit for Expedia, Hotels.com, or Vrbo bookings through Capital One Travel
